overall_assessment: The bounded package shows a materially strengthened RR-AUTH-04 baseline with broad validation coverage and no clear implementation regression inside the provided evidence, but it is not closure-ready because the package itself records that required corrected-baseline review reruns, triple-audit round 02, the Claude comparison, and final orchestration guards are still outstanding.

findings.title: Closure evidence is still incomplete against the package's own required gate set
findings.rationale: The package explicitly states RR-AUTH-04 remains blocked pending fresh no-context rerun review lanes, triple-audit round 02, the Claude fourth-auditor comparison, and final orchestration guards. Given the dispatch goal is closure-focused final review on the corrected baseline, recommending close from this packet would bypass the package's own stated minimum evidence floor rather than resolve it.
findings.suggested_action: Do not close RR-AUTH-04 on this packet alone. Complete the corrected-baseline rerun review lanes, triple-audit round 02, the Claude comparison record, and the final orchestration guard reconciliation, then rerun closure review on the refreshed authority set.
